name: Corned Beef & Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 Cabbage head, cut into small wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a removable crock pot liner with the cabbage placed on top.
2. Cut the corned beef to fit the size of the liner if necessary.
3. Place the liner into the base of the crock pot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 10-12 hours, or high for 6-7 hours, or set to auto for 6-8 hours.
